name: coordinated-swap
description: Both agents must move objects without collision. A moves rock right, B moves tree up. If uncoordinated, they collide at (1,1).
task_a: You can see world-state.json. There is a rock at row 0 col 1 and a tree at row 2 col 0. YOUR job: move the rock ONE step to the RIGHT (to row 0 col 2). But Agent B is also moving an object. If you both target the same cell, you COLLIDE. Coordinate with B through messages to avoid collision. Write ANSWER.md with the final positions of both objects when you agree.
task_b: You CANNOT see the world state but Agent A can and will describe it. There is a rock and a tree on the grid. YOUR job: move the tree ONE step UP. But Agent A is also moving an object. If you both target the same cell, you COLLIDE. Coordinate with A through messages to avoid collision. Write ANSWER.md with the final positions of both objects when you agree.
